_note: Site configuration for the Roadmap & Ideas page. contactEmail = where suggestions are sent if no Formspree id is set. formspreeId = optional; create a free form at formspree.io and paste its id (the part after /f/) to collect suggestions without opening the user's email client.

roadmap.title: Email each executive their portfolio updates
roadmap.detail: Automatically email every VP a monthly digest of only the governance items matched to their portfolio (e.g. VP Academics gets Academic/Business/University Affairs Board items), so they don't have to open the dashboard.

roadmap.title: Member suggestion inbox
roadmap.detail: Let any grad student suggest a body to track, flag an item that matters, or request a deeper summary — collected here and reviewed by the VP Internal.

roadmap.title: Slack / Discord alerts
roadmap.detail: Post a message to the UTGSU staff channel whenever a new agenda package with high grad-student relevance is detected.

roadmap.title: Searchable archive of past years
roadmap.detail: Keep prior academic years so you can search across the full history of what each body decided and when.

roadmap.title: Action tracker
roadmap.detail: Flag items that need a UTGSU response (a deputation, a letter, a vote) and track them to completion.

roadmap.title: OCR for scanned documents
roadmap.detail: Read presentations and reports that are posted as scanned images with no text layer, so nothing is missed.
